mainContext.en: Do you want to drink some water?

moreContext.en: Tomorrow, the weather will be nice.

mainContext.en: I want to be with you.

moreContext.en: He is going to be late.

moreContext.fr: Il faut avoir de la patience.
moreContext.phonetic: Eel foh ah-vwahr duh lah pah-syahns

mainContext.en: What are you going to do?

moreContext.en: I have to do my homework.

mainContext.fr: C'est la bonne chose à faire.
mainContext.phonetic: Seh lah bun shohz ah fehr
mainContext.en: It is the right thing to do.

moreContext.en: There are a lot of people.

mainContext.fr: Il habite dans une grande ville.
mainContext.phonetic: Eel ah-beet dahnz oon grahnd veel
mainContext.en: He lives in a big city.
I am having dinner with my friends.

mainContext.fr: Je veux sortir, mais il pleut.
mainContext.phonetic: Zhuh vuh sor-teer meh eel pluh
mainContext.en: I want to go out, but it's raining.

mainContext.fr: Je mange parce que j'ai faim.
mainContext.phonetic: Zhuh mahnzh pahrs kuh zhay fahn
mainContext.en: I am eating because I am hungry.

moreContext.fr: Il pleut parce que c'est l'hiver.
moreContext.phonetic: Eel pluh pahrs kuh seh lee-vehr
moreContext.en: It is raining because it's winter.

mainContext.en: I have to go to the supermarket.
What do you mean? / What do you want to say?

meaning: To know (a fact or how to do something)

moreContext.en: Do you know how to swim?

mainContext.en: I want to see this movie.

moreContext.fr: Je vois ce que tu veux dire.
moreContext.phonetic: Zhuh vwah suh kuh too vuh deer

mainContext.fr: La France est un beau pays.
mainContext.phonetic: Lah Frahns eht uhn boh pay-ee

mainContext.en: The child is playing in the park.

mainContext.fr: Le chat est dans la maison.
mainContext.phonetic: Luh shah eh dahn lah meh-zohn
mainContext.en: The cat is in the house.

moreContext.en: I am leaving in ten minutes.

mainContext.fr: Le livre est sur la table.
mainContext.phonetic: Luh leevr eh soor lah tahbl
mainContext.en: The book is on the table.

moreContext.en: I have a lot of work.

moreContext.fr: Elle est aussi grande que moi.
moreContext.phonetic: El eht oh-see grahnd kuh mwah
moreContext.en: She is as tall as me.

moreContext.fr: Il n'y a rien à faire.
moreContext.phonetic: Eel nee ah ry-ehn ah fehr

mainContext.en: I am going to come tomorrow.
I am going to take a coffee.
I want to give you this.
I am reading a good book.

mainContext.fr: Je ne comprends pas ce mot.
mainContext.phonetic: Zhuh nuh kohn-prahn pah suh moh
mainContext.en: I do not understand this word.

moreContext.fr: Il n'a pas dit un mot.
moreContext.phonetic: Eel nah pah dee uhn moh

mainContext.fr: On se voit après le travail.
mainContext.phonetic: Ohn suh vwah ah-preh luh trah-vye
mainContext.en: We'll see each other after work.

mainContext.fr: Le chien est sous la table.
mainContext.phonetic: Luh shyahn eh soo lah tahbl
mainContext.en: The dog is under the table.

mainContext.fr: Je ne peux pas trouver mes clés.
mainContext.phonetic: Zhuh nuh puh pah troo-vay may klay

mainContext.en: I want to speak to you.
I will come by to see you.
I am going to set the table.

mainContext.fr: Je bois du café le matin.
mainContext.phonetic: Zhuh bwah doo kah-fay luh mah-tahn
mainContext.en: I drink coffee in the morning.
What are you doing this evening?

mainContext.fr: Est-ce que cette place est libre ?
mainContext.phonetic: Ess kuh set plahs eh leebr

moreContext.fr: Il n'y a plus de place.
moreContext.phonetic: Eel nee ah ploo duh plahs

mainContext.en: It is very easy to do.
I often go to the cinema.

mainContext.fr: Un café sans sucre, s'il vous plaît.
mainContext.phonetic: Uhn kah-fay sahn sookr seel voo pleh

moreContext.fr: Je ne peux pas vivre sans toi.
moreContext.phonetic: Zhuh nuh puh pah veevr sahn twah

meaning: At / To someone's home or place

mainContext.en: I am going back to my place.

moreContext.en: At our house / in our country.

mainContext.en: When are you going to leave?
